participant_id.Description: Unique BIDS identifier for the subject.

time_point.Description: The ordinal week of the longitudinal tracking period once animals were weaned (e.g., week1=P21-P27, week2=P28-P34 etc).

body_length_cm.Description: Measurement from the tip of the nose to the ischium (posterior region of the hip bone, a bony projection on either side of the tail).

tail_length_cm.Description: Measurement from the base of the tail (ischium again) to the distal tip.
